rationale: The cited paper focuses on temporal consistency of promotions/shelf availability in packaged-goods SKU choice using an RCGSMNL model, while the citing paper studies causal effects of a mobile app outage on omnichannel purchasing via DID, so direct methodological or focal-construct overlap appears limited. However, the citing note does mention prior evidence on stockouts/availability effects, which could make this citation more than purely incidental background. With only a DOI-level match and no in-text citation context in the provided evidence, the pair cannot be safely dropped.
